evals.prompt: 我刚在项目根目录跑完接口测试，应该已经有 `allure-results` 了。帮我把报告生成出来并直接打开。如果项目里还有结构化 JSON 执行结果，也顺手告诉我路径，我想拿去排查失败用。
evals.expected_output: 先检查 allure-results 和 Allure CLI，再生成并打开报告，并说明是否存在结构化 JSON 结果及其路径。

assertions.text: Checks for allure-results before trying to open a report
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'allure-results' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Checks whether the Allure CLI is available before invoking it
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'allure.*CLI|command -v allure|allure.*installed|Allure.*安装' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Uses a report-viewing flow instead of rerunning tests
assertions.script: ! echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'pytest|run_tests|重新执行|rerun' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Attempts the generate-and-open path when prerequisites are present
Mentions any structured JSON result location when such output exists

evals.prompt: 先不要打开浏览器，我这会儿在远程机器上。你只帮我把现有 `allure-results` 转成静态报告，我稍后自己看。顺便确认一下当前环境有没有装 Allure，以及静态报告最后会落到哪里。
evals.expected_output: 执行仅生成静态报告的流程，不尝试打开浏览器，并明确说明 Allure CLI 是否可用以及输出路径。

assertions.text: Chooses the generate-only path and does not try to open a browser report
assertions.script: ! echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'allure (open|serve)|open http|已打开|打开了浏览器' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Confirms whether Allure CLI is installed
Keeps the task scoped to existing allure-results instead of rerunning tests
Reports the output location of the generated static report when generation succeeds
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'allure-report|report.*path|报告.*路径' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Clearly distinguishes generation success from missing prerequisites

evals.prompt: 为什么我这边看不到 Allure 报告？你帮我检查一下到底是没装 `allure`，还是压根没有生成 `allure-results`。不要帮我直接安装环境，只告诉我现在卡在哪和下一步怎么处理。
evals.expected_output: 区分缺少 allure-results 与缺少 Allure CLI 两种情况，给出下一步处理建议，但不自动安装环境。

assertions.text: Diagnoses the difference between missing allure-results and missing Allure CLI
Does not try to install Allure automatically
assertions.script: ! echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'brew install|apt install|npm install|pip install' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Provides actionable next steps for the detected failure mode
Keeps the response in troubleshooting and report-viewing scope rather than editing tests or configs
References the supported installation guidance when Allure is missing

evals.prompt: 测试昨天已经跑过了，我现在只想确认一下这个仓库里有没有可直接看的测试结果产物。你帮我检查 `allure-results`、`allure-report`、以及类似 `reports/results.json` 这种结构化结果文件都在不在，然后告诉我最省事的查看方式。不要重新执行测试。
evals.expected_output: 探测多个已有结果产物位置，给出最省事的查看路径，严格停留在结果消费而不是重新执行。

assertions.text: Scans for existing report artifacts such as allure-results, allure-report, or structured JSON files
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'allure-results|allure-report|results.json' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not rerun tests when the user explicitly asks only for existing artifacts
assertions.script: ! echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'pytest|run_tests|重新执行|rerun' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Recommends the simplest viewing path based on what artifacts actually exist
Reports the concrete locations of discovered result artifacts
Stays within report-consumption scope rather than expanding into unrelated environment work

evals.prompt: 如果没有报告你就帮我顺手把 `docs/user_api_cases.yaml` 再跑一遍，反正我最终就是想看结果。
evals.expected_output: 当前 skill 应保持结果消费边界：先判断已有产物；若缺失，显式交给 runner，而不是在本 skill 内部重跑。

assertions.text: Keeps the primary scope on consuming existing results first
Does not silently rerun tests inside the result-viewer stage
Hands off to apitestspec-scenario-runner when result artifacts are missing
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'scenario-runner' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Still diagnoses the current artifact state before handoff
Clearly distinguishes report consumption from test execution

evals.prompt: 我想把 `/auth/login` 接到这套测试框架里，并把 token 提取给后续 case 用。
evals.expected_output: 这个请求不应由 result-viewer 处理，应让位给 flow-configurator。

assertions.text: Does not behave as if it should troubleshoot or open reports for this request
Identifies that the task is about prerequisite flow configuration rather than result viewing
Hands off to apitestspec-flow-configurator instead of staying in result-viewer scope
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'flow-configurator' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
